resolved_sublemmas.name: global repair-tick lemma
resolved_sublemmas.result: under the declared area-law counting model the readback fixed-point equation is equivalent to the closure transport G_N(1) = rho_star, giving the full-cycle multiplier (N_CRC/pi)^(-1/2); the derived 24-tick branch gives |g_*'| = (N_CRC/pi)^(-1/48)
resolved_sublemmas.declared_input: finite readback resolution is supplied separately by R_readback_resolution_certificate.json; the round count is supplied by R_m_rep_24_certificate.json

resolved_sublemmas.name: representation-to-spectrum round-count theorem
resolved_sublemmas.result: m_rep=2*dim(su(3)+su(2)+u(1))=2*(8+3+1)=24 on the realized product-gauge branch; the cyclic repair scheduler on the oriented adjoint support has spectral period 24

resolved_sublemmas.name: finite readback-resolution certificate
resolved_sublemmas.result: the fixed-cutoff readback pipeline F_r(N)=Cap_read(Obs(nf_{r,N}(U_{r,N}))) has one selected positive central capacity atom, so rho_read(r,N)=sqrt(pi/F_r(N)) is a singleton and rho_read(r,N_CRC) -> (N_CRC/pi)^(-1/2) in the positive-root refinement limit

resolved_sublemmas.name: joint product fixed-point/stability theorem
resolved_sublemmas.result: on the product-separated source map J(P,x)=(Gamma(P),C_hat(x)), component contractions give a unique stable joint fixed point; genuinely coupled source feedback requires the weighted-sup derivative condition max(a+b/r,d+r*c)<1

resolved_sublemmas.name: electroweak tick-projection bridge
resolved_sublemmas.result: Pi_EW(P,N)=24*pi/(alpha_U(P)*log(N/pi)); the target Pi_EW=4P is equivalent to B_EW(P,N)=alpha_U(P)*log(N/pi)-6*pi/P=0; rounded N_CRC=3.31e122 is diagnostic and fails the exact bridge residual

resolved_sublemmas.name: EW-refined exact global-capacity certificate
resolved_sublemmas.result: C_EW(P,x)=(1-lambda)*x+lambda*6*pi/(P*alpha_U(P)) is a contraction at lambda=1/2; its unique fixed point gives N_CRC^EW=pi*exp[6*pi/(P_star*alpha_U(P_star))] and B_EW(P_star,N_CRC^EW)=0

resolved_sublemmas.name: RG/coarse-graining naturality theorem
resolved_sublemmas.result: epsilon_n=epsilon_h=epsilon_H=0 on the selected exact source-to-Higgs normal-form square, with measured weak-scale and gravity inputs forbidden
